title: Survivor NPC
description: A handcrafted, named survivor (FR-NPC-01). Static definition only; per-run state (needs, location, alive, trust) lives in GameState.npcs, seeded at spawn (T33). `disposition` sets the survivor's starting trust toward the player (T34). background/personality/secret are the character flavour surfaced later (T35+).

$schema.description: Optional editor hint pointing at this schema.

id.description: Stable content id of the form npc.<slug>.

description.description: How the survivor reads on first meeting (ICU MessageFormat string).

homeNode.description: Preferred starting node id; when absent the `npc` RNG stream picks one (T33).

background.description: One-line history — who they were before (FR-NPC-01).

secret.description: Something they are not telling you yet (FR-NPC-01; surfaced via T35+).

notes.description: Author commentary (JSON has no comments, ADR-0002).
